title: H_005 G3-a verdict: WIRING FAILURE (precond) + K3 вҶ’ consolidate at G-2 The learned-ПҮМӮ run (free-slot d=384 Г—2seed) returned WIRING FAILURE: A-ПҮМӮ fit its own drill unstably (1.0/0.832, s1<0.95) вҖ” a training-stability limit of the tiny learned bilinear g (wiring clean; A-hand on the same rig fit 1.0/1.0). Substantive signal needs no unstable seed: F1a passes (О” 0.298/0.191, F4/F5 clean) but F1aвҖІ FAILS both incl the fit seed s0 (A-ПҮМӮ 0.82/0.71 вүӘ A-hand 1.0, margin вҲ’0.18/вҲ’0.29) = Fable's K3 вҖ” the learned ПҮМӮ cannot reproduce the hand concord at this scale (honest-limit a, G3-0d probe=1.0). DECISION per K3 STOP: CONSOLIDATE AT G-2. H_004's FIELD-FORMAT claim (рҹҹў SUPPORTED) is the campaign's proven, defensible result; G3-a does not extend it; no re-run (fit-seed F1aвҖІ-fail excludes SUPPORTED). G3-b/H_006 (trained SUPPORT) remains the only untried lever but is strictly harder вҖ” needs a fresh research gate. Card+REGISTRY+SSOT updated.

H_005 G3-0d gate PASS (probe ПҶвҶ’hon=1.0) вҖ” buildable, honest-limit(a) scoped The G3-a admissibility gate ran on the real d=384 CPT trunk: logistic probe ПҶвҶ’hon held-out acc=1.0 (n=1200) вүҘ0.90 вҶ’ PASS, ПҮМӮ=g(ПҶ) can read concord, G3-a is buildable. But acc=1.0 hits honest-limit(a) at the ceiling: the templatic drill register lets the frozen trunk encode the hon bit near-verbatim, so g(ПҶ) is ~one linear unmix from g(raw hon); the eventual F1a-green claim is SCOPED to 'concord recoverable from trunk representations on the drill register' вҖ” a modest, honestly-bounded result (F5 still guards vacuity). Recorded on the card + SSOT node ng.mech1.g3a-h005. Also fixed card F6 inconsistency (G3-a has no C-plc; C-ПҮМӮplc IS the placebo). NEXT: F4/F5 for A-ПҮМӮ + collect_verdict_g3a вҶ’ H_005 freeze вҶ’ ~4h run.

H_005 pre-register SEED вҖ” G3-a learned ПҮМӮ (values half of the learned duel) After H_004 рҹҹў SUPPORTED + the G-3 research-gate, the next method-step (pre-register) is done: H_005 cards G3-a вҖ” can a LEARNED concord ПҮМӮ=g(ПҶбөў,ПҶвұј) on the FIXED proxy support reproduce the hand-computed field's causal power. Lever = ПҮ policy (hand ПҮ vs learned ПҮМӮ), support held fixed. Arms A-ПҮМӮ/A-hand/C-ПҮМӮplc/C-scaf/C-perm; primary F1a d_acc(A-ПҮМӮ)вҲ’d_acc(C-ПҮМӮplc)вүҘ0.15 both (headroom 0.32, 2Г— the bar); F1aвҖІ non-inferiority A-ПҮМӮвүҘA-handвҲ’0.05; F2-F6/harness carried from H_004 on free-slot d_acc. NOT frozen вҖ” $0 gate G3-0d (hon-bit trunk probe вүҘ0.9) + a d=64 smoke (device+injection+one-variable, per this session's 3-defect discipline) gate the freeze. Kill K2/K3 вҶ’ consolidate at H_004's FORMAT claim. H_004 stays sealed.

H_004 mech-1 нҢҢм„ңкІ°нҲ¬ вҶ’ рҹҹў SUPPORTED (first non-negative verdict) collect_verdict_h004.py on the free-slot d=384 Г—2seed Г—5arm run returns SUPPORTED: F1 О”(A-duelвҲ’A-rank1)=0.3789/0.3802 вүҘ0.15 both seeds, and critically the two measurements that killed anima(v1) both PASS вҖ” F4 offtop 0.6467/0.6963 вүҘ0.20 (R reads a HIGH-rank field, not L1's rank-1 one-bit seam) and F5 d_dacc 0.5/0.5 вүҘ0.05 (strip the resolution вҶ’ A-duel 1.0вҶ’0.5, so the decoder needs the resolved field, not L2's any-tensor capacity); F2/F3/F6/harness/precond all clean both seeds. The parse-tension FIELD FORMAT (edge-aligned, high-dimensional) causes held-out honorific binding beyond its rank-1 summary. SCOPE: ПҮ is hand-computed, so this certifies the FIELD FORMAT as causal carrier but does NOT yet claim a trained parser pair produces it вҖ” SUPPORTED licenses building the learned-duel stage next. Reached after 3 root-caused defects (device-placement В· CE-dilution В· GF(2)-rank-4 parity metric-ceiling). Card+REGISTRY+SSOT updated.

H_004 free-slot fit-check GO вҶ’ full run RE-LAUNCHED Free-slot fit-check PASSED all three bars: A-duel free drill 1.0/1.0 (bar1), ce_ans 0.0004 (bar2), C-perm free drill 0.4648вҲҲ[.40,.60] + held-out f2вҖі 0.4922вҲҲ[.45,.55] + parity slots 1.0/1.0 (bar3) вҶ’ GO. Per-slot [0.25,0.47,0.61,1.0,0.53,1.0] confirms Fable's parity diagnosis exactly (free slots chance, parity slots 1.0) and the leak is gone under free-slot scoring. Card RE-FROZEN with 2 documented quarantine amendments (A1 objective dilution, A2 free-slot metric; arms/panels/T/thresholds unchanged). Full run re-launched: d=384 Г—2seed Г—5arm, drill 4000, free-slot metric (~4h).

H_004 bar3 adjudicated: metric parity-ceiling defect вҶ’ free-slot re-registration Fable (btgczi488) + $0 reference-match on the codebook found the bar3 fail is NOT a surface leak but a metric-ceiling defect: the K=6 gold codebook is GF(2) rank-4 (slot3=s0вҠ•s1вҠ•s2, slot5=s1вҠ•s2вҠ•s4 on all codewords, drill+f2вҖі); teacher-forced scoring lets any answer-LM (incl. shuffled-gold C-perm) complete the 2 parity slots вҶ’ field-blind d_acc ceiling 0.667 reaching held-out. Per-slot log confirms C-perm=[0.25,0.5,0.59,1.0,0.5,1.0] (parity slots 1.0, free slots chance). A-duel F1 equally inflated вҶ’ mech-1 uninterpretable at registered thresholds вҖ” the run would have burned even had bar3 passed (H_001 admissibility recurrence). FIX (Fable option i, $0): dacc_panel scores only field-carried FREE slots {0,1,2,4} computed from the codebook; C-perm re-scores 0.643вҶ’0.465 (chance). bar3 corrected two-sided + held-out f2вҖі + parity confirmation. Free-slot fit-check running; full run held. Convergence build-honbind-multi-py-1.

H_004 bar3 probe: leak reaches held-out (d=64 confound) bar3_probe.py (d=64 discriminator) FLIPPED the benign prior: C-perm held-out f2вҖі=0.6615 (out of harness band [0.45,0.55]), A-duel held-out f2вҖі=1.0. The bar3 fail is NOT benign drill-memorization вҖ” the Г—65 answer up-weight makes the answer recoverable via a non-field (surface) channel that reaches the held-out panel. CONFOUND: probe is d=64 while run-1's clean C-perm (0.45/0.5) was d=384 under the diluted objective, so boosted-objective-leaks is not yet separated from d=64-over-exploits-surface. Missing decisive cell = C-perm f2вҖі at d=384 boosted. Fable-5 adjudicating; full 5-arm run held until the harness is clean.

H_004 fit-check: dilution fix CONFIRMED (bar1/2), bar3 harness NO-GO Fit-check (MPS d=64/L2, CPT 200 + drill 1500) confirmed the objective-dilution fix: A-duel drill d_acc 0.83/0.64 (run-1) вҶ’ 1.0/1.0 seed-stable, ce_ansвҶ’0.0004 (bar1+bar2 PASS). This validates the root cause was masked-CE dilution + under-optimization, not capacity (recorded as convergence train-h004-py-3). bar3 (C-perm on drill true-gold вүӨ0.60) FAILED at 0.6432 вҶ’ NO-GO, full run not launched. bar3 gates the harness arm on the drill (training-dist, memorizable) whereas the frozen harness gate measures C-perm on held-out f2вҖі (run-1=0.45/0.5, clean) вҖ” adjudication (genuine surface-leak reaching f2вҖі vs benign d=64 memorization) delegated to Fable-5.

H_004 objective amendment applied (drill CE dilution fix) Absorbed Fable-5 root-cause (btgczi488): run-1 precond failed because drill CE converged to 6В·ln2/233=0.0178 вҖ” masked CE over ~233 surface bytes drowned the 18 answer bytes so the objective could not distinguish binding-solved from chance. Applied 6 arm-blind fixes to train_h004.py (F1 thresholds/arms/panels frozen): two-term drill CE (ce_surf + 5.0В·ce_ans, Г—65 answer up-weight via new amask over predict-positions base-1..base+3K-2), drill LR warmup+cosine 3e-4вҶ’1e-5, grad-clip 1.0, per-step logging, drill_steps 2500вҶ’4000, and a --fit-check d=64 MPS pre-flight with a 3-part go-bar. CPU smoke GREEN (WIRING-4 A-duel overfits 16 items to d_acc=1.0, injection path intact after the objective change). Honest downside: if a properly-fitted A-duel still shows f2вҖі gap <0.05 vs A-rank1, that is mech-1 falsified, not an artifact.

H_004 G-2 run complete вҶ’ WIRING FAILURE (precond) The parser-duel falsification run finished (d=384, 5 arms Г— 2 seeds, ~3.5h MPS) but collect_verdict_h004.py returned WIRING FAILURE, not a mechanism verdict: the frozen admissibility precond drill d_acc(A-duel) вүҘ 0.95 failed (s0=0.8255, s1=0.6354). Quarantined per infra-wall-noneval + verdict-integrity вҖ” the model never fit its own K=6 drill, so no falsifier is admissible; this is a training/capacity wall, not mech-1's answer. Drill fit is above chance but seed-unstable (0.83вҶ”0.64), pointing at under-training over a capacity ceiling; prime suspect is the drill masking CE over all ~250 surface bytes rather than the 6 answer slots. Raw seed panel recorded (F1 О” seed0 +0.20 / seed1 вҲ’0.02, controls clean) but gated by the failed precond. Root-cause + minimal-fix design delegated to Fable-5; F1 thresholds/arms/panels stay frozen.

Smoke caught+fixed 2 wiring bugs pre-GPU (pad-truncation; struct off-by-one at answer-prediction position). H_004 G-2 drill grid built (gen_drill_h004.py вҶ’ drill_grid_multi.json, n=384): K=6 MULTI-BIND on drilled 9HON/8PLAIN pools, GF(4)-MDS decorrelated (per-slot 0.5, pairwise dev 0.0), F7вҖі lexeme-disjointness PENDINGвҶ’PASS (held-out lexemes + кё°лӢӨл ёл„Өмҡ” absent from every drill surface). Freeze gated ONLY on native-operator confirm (PL normativity В· loose associative PмқҳH genitives В· 6-stack length), then pre_register_frozen вҶ’ G-2 d384.
